verses.1:1: In the Name of Allah — the Most Compassionate, Most Merciful.
verses.1:2: All praise is for Allah — Lord of all worlds,
verses.1:4: Master of the Day of Judgment.
verses.1:5: You ˹alone˺ we worship and You ˹alone˺ we ask for help.
verses.1:6: Guide us along the Straight Path,
verses.1:7: the Path of those You have blessed — not those You are displeased with, or those who are astray.
